summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) No Pester test files provided or created despite explicit TDD requirement. (2) Workflow does not execute `Invoke-Pester`; task demands 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' but workflow only runs validator. (3) No `act-result.txt` artifact produced; required by spec. (4) Workflow missing actionlint validation step (req'd). (5) Base64 encoding in 'Emit report digest' step is over-engineered and fragile (regex-based extraction, lines 169-174). Script itself (Invoke-SecretRotationValidator.ps1) is competent: proper Set-StrictMode, parameter validation, error handling, PSCustomObject typing. But complete deliverable violates core task requirements: no TDD cycle, no tests, no CI test execution path, no test harness artifact. Workflow structure triggers/permissions adequate; parameter resolution has minor duplication (lines 161-172).
